query:
SELECT e.id, e.nombre, e.residenteId, e.jefeResidenteId, e.proyectoId, e.activo,
       r.name as residente_nombre, jr.name as jefe_nombre
FROM empresas e
LEFT JOIN users r ON e.residenteId = r.id
LEFT JOIN users jr ON e.jefeResidenteId = jr.id
WHERE e.activo = 1 AND (e.residenteId IS NOT NULL OR e.jefeResidenteId IS NOT NULL);

       r.name as residente_nombre, jr.name as jefe_nombre
FROM empresas e
LEFT JOIN users r ON e.residenteId = r.id
LEFT JOIN users jr ON e.jefeResidenteId = jr.id
WHERE e.activo = 1 AND (e.residenteId IS NOT NULL OR e.jefeResidenteId IS NOT NULL);
